option.value: /PilihMenuAdapter (snapshot).kt

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
filePath
option.value: /item_cart_summary (snapshot).xml

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingVertical="12dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical">
<!-- LEFT: STROKE + NAME --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical">
<!-- Yellow/Accent Stroke --> <View android:layout_width="4dp" android:layout_height="60dp" android:background="@color/accent" android:layout_marginEnd="12dp" />
<!-- MENU NAME + STOK --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:id="@+id/txtMenuName" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Menu Name" android:textColor="#FDCF08" android:textStyle="bold" android:textSize="16sp" android:fontFamily="@font/plus_jakarta" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginTop="4dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Stok: " android:textColor="#A90F2B" android:textSize="12sp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/txtStok" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="0" android:textColor="#A90F2B" android:textStyle="bold" android:textSize="12sp" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text=" | " android:textColor="#A90F2B" android:textSize="12sp" android:layout_marginHorizontal="4dp" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Jumlah: " android:textColor="#A90F2B" android:textSize="12sp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/txtJumlah" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="0" android:textColor="#A90F2B" android:textStyle="bold" android:textSize="12sp" />
</LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>
<!-- RIGHT: TOTAL SUB --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="end" android:layout_marginStart="12dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Total" android:textColor="#A90F2B" android:textSize="12sp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/txtTotalSubHarga" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Rp 0" android:textColor="#FDCF08" android:textStyle="bold" android:textSize="14sp" android:fontFamily="@font/plus_jakarta" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" />
</LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>
<!-- DIVIDER --> <View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:background="#F2F2F2" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" />
</LinearLayout>

option.name: filePath
option.value: /item_meja_kasir (snapshot).xml

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:id="@+id/layoutMeja" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingHorizontal="10dp" android:paddingVertical="12dp">
<!-- TOP CHAIR (Lebih Lebar) --> <View android:id="@+id/chairTop" android:layout_width="100dp" android:layout_height="10dp" android:background="@color/white" />
<!-- TABLE (Sangat Lebar dan Pipih) --> <TextView android:id="@+id/txtMeja" android:layout_width="140dp" android:layout_height="30dp" android:layout_marginVertical="3dp" android:background="@color/white" android:fontFamily="@font/plus_jakarta" android:gravity="center" android:text="A" android:textColor="@color/primary" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<!-- BOTTOM CHAIR --> <View android:id="@+id/chairBottom" android:layout_width="100dp" android:layout_height="10dp" android:background="@color/white" />
</LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:id="@+id/layoutMeja" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingHorizontal="8dp" android:paddingVertical="8dp">
<!-- TOP CHAIR (Lebih Lebar) --> <View android:id="@+id/chairTop" android:layout_width="80dp" android:layout_height="10dp" android:background="@color/white" />
<!-- TABLE (Sangat Lebar dan Pipih) --> <TextView android:id="@+id/txtMeja" android:layout_width="120dp" android:layout_height="30dp" android:layout_marginVertical="3dp" android:background="@color/white" android:fontFamily="@font/plus_jakarta" android:gravity="center" android:text="A" android:textColor="@color/primary" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<!-- BOTTOM CHAIR --> <View android:id="@+id/chairBottom" android:layout_width="80dp" android:layout_height="10dp" android:background="@color/white" />
</LinearLayout>

option.name: filePath
option.value: /item_menu (snapshot).xml

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="170dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="20dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_card_menu" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="12dp">
<!-- IMAGE --> <com.google.android.material.imageview.ShapeableImageView android:id="@+id/imgMenu" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="150dp" android:layout_marginBottom="4dp" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:src="@drawable/logo_bfc" app:shapeAppearanceOverlay="@style/RoundedImageMenu" app:strokeColor="@color/accent" app:strokeWidth="2dp" />
<!-- TITLE --> <TextView android:id="@+id/txtNamaMenu" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:fontFamily="@font/plus_jakarta" android:text="Nasi + Ayam" android:textColor="@color/accent" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:maxLines="2" android:ellipsize="end" />
<!-- CATEGORY --> <com.google.android.flexbox.FlexboxLayout android:id="@+id/layoutKategori" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" app:flexDirection="row" app:flexWrap="wrap" />
<!-- PRICE --> <TextView android:id="@+id/txtHarga" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:fontFamily="@font/plus_jakarta" android:text="Rp 9.000" android:textColor="@color/accent" android:textSize="16sp" />
<!-- ACTION --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:orientation="horizontal">
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/btnEdit" android:layout_width="42dp" android:layout_height="42dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_action_menu" android:gravity="center">
<ImageView android:layout_width="20dp" android:layout_height="20dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_edit" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/btnDelete" android:layout_width="42dp" android:layout_height="42dp" android:layout_marginStart="10dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_action_menu" android:gravity="center">
<ImageView android:layout_width="20dp" android:layout_height="20dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_delete" /> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="170dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="20dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_card_menu" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="12dp">
<!-- IMAGE --> <com.google.android.material.imageview.ShapeableImageView android:id="@+id/imgMenu" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="150dp" android:layout_marginBottom="4dp" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:src="@drawable/logo_bfc" app:shapeAppearanceOverlay="@style/RoundedImageMenu" app:strokeColor="@color/accent" app:strokeWidth="2dp" />
<!-- TITLE --> <TextView android:id="@+id/txtNamaMenu" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:fontFamily="@font/plus_jakarta" android:text="Nasi + Ayam" android:textColor="@color/accent" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:maxLines="2" android:ellipsize="end" />
<!-- CATEGORY --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/layoutKategori" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:orientation="vertical" />
<!-- PRICE --> <TextView android:id="@+id/txtHarga" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:fontFamily="@font/plus_jakarta" android:text="Rp 9.000" android:textColor="@color/accent" android:textSize="16sp" />
<!-- ACTION --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:orientation="horizontal">
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/btnEdit" android:layout_width="42dp" android:layout_height="42dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_action_menu" android:gravity="center">
<ImageView android:layout_width="20dp" android:layout_height="20dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_edit" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/btnDelete" android:layout_width="42dp" android:layout_height="42dp" android:layout_marginStart="10dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_action_menu" android:gravity="center">
<ImageView android:layout_width="20dp" android:layout_height="20dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_delete" /> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout>
